description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a sprawling rectangular footprint, surrounded by a manicured lawn and enclosed by a green hedge. The front facade features a wide driveway leading to a three-car garage, with a main entrance set back from the street. Large windows are symmetrically arranged along the front and sides, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The backyard includes a swimming pool, sun loungers, and a shaded patio area, complemented by mature trees and outdoor seating. The roof is flat, with subtle parapet walls, and the exterior is finished in a light, neutral color palette. The overall design is modern and open, emphasizing outdoor living and seamless transitions between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a three-car garage, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool and patio.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the backyard with a swimming pool, sun loungers, patio seating, and mature trees, highlighting the outdoor living area.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front facade with a wide driveway, three-car garage, main entrance, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the side and rear of the bungalow, emphasizing the expansive lawn, driveway, and the covered patio area.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the backyard amenities, including the pool, patio, and garden, with the rear elevation of the bungalow visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
